commands.review_summary:
Adds an admin-only package-name repair endpoint, response schema, and `clawhub-mod plugins repair-name` command that can dry-run, retire an occupied target name, rename the source package, optionally transfer ownership, and sync search digests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main rejects code-plugin publishes when the stored runtimeId differs from the incoming runtimeId, and the linked discussion identifies the exact OpenViking package names. The production row state still requires admin-only verification.
